_meta.data: global_alpha_dataset_1h_2pct.csv (rebuilt after Tier 2 features confirmed harmful)
_meta.feature_count_change: Dropped from 15 -> 14: bar_range_pct removed after leave-one-out ablation showed it actively hurt predictions (+2.7pp global WR, +3.0pp SOL WR, +9.5pp P3 stability when removed). Highly redundant with realized_vol_24h and atr_14_pct.
_meta.rationale_overview: OOF analysis after dropping bar_range_pct: per-symbol edge structure preserved AND P3 stability fixed. SOL strongest, DOGE/XRP/AVAX hold their edge, and ETH/BTC newly cross the n>=100 + WR>=50% bar. ETH added (58.2% WR / 110 trades). BTC NOT added (52.6% WR is within sampling noise of 50%; revisit after live data accumulates). ADA/BNB/LINK still skipped.
_meta.stability_check: Chronological 3-period split improved across the board: P1 50.0%->57.1%, P2 60.6%->60.0%, P3 38.8%->48.3%. The previous P3 instability was largely caused by bar_range_pct noise.
_meta.tier2_status: session and cross-asset features tried and reverted in earlier session: D-only WR=35.7%, E-only WR=47.3% on 3y OOF -> both negative additions
_meta.experiments_log: A (vol-scaled barriers): failed. B (walk-forward retraining 1y/2y): failed. I (single-feature ablation): drop bar_range_pct = win. See git log.

_default.rationale: No validated per-symbol edge; threshold>1 means never enters. Must be explicitly listed below to trade.

SOLUSDT.rationale: Strongest per-symbol edge: 63.3% WR over 120 trades after dropping bar_range_pct (was 60.3% / 141). EPnL +0.53%/trade. Highest priority symbol.

DOGEUSDT.rationale: Solid edge: 54.0% WR over 137 trades. Slight regression from previous 55.6% but still meaningfully positive at lower threshold.

XRPUSDT.rationale: Improved from prior 52.3% to 53.4% WR. Sample dropped from 1315 to 667 trades (model became more selective) which is a feature, not a bug -- per-trade EPnL up.

AVAXUSDT.rationale: Marginal but improved: 52.8% WR over 142 trades (was 51.8% / 137). Conservative threshold.

ETHUSDT.rationale: NEWLY TRADABLE after drop_BR: 58.2% WR over 110 trades, EPnL +0.33%/trade. Threshold tighter than SOL because edge concentrates in higher-confidence tail. Not previously tradable in 15-feature model (failed n>=100 cutoff).
